beats.narration: By the time you uncoil a probe, every consequential call is made. The written procedure is your contract with the part.

payload.title: THE PROCEDURE OWNS THE TEST
payload.sub: You execute the decisions. You do not make them at the bench.

beats.narration: Trace the chain above you. A contract invokes a code or spec; the written practice says who qualifies; a Level Three writes the procedure.
Inside it live the essential variables. Frequency, probe and shielding, fill factor, scan speed, reference standard — change any one and the physics of the response shifts.

payload.heading: Locked: the essential variables
payload.note: ESSENTIAL CHANGE → REVISE · REQUALIFY · APPROVE BEFORE THE NEXT PART

beats.narration: So execute the sequence. Confirm the revision, standardize as written, verify on schedule. A failed check leaves every part since the last good one unproven.
When the part, the gear, or the criteria do not match the page, a Level Two stops and gets written approval. That stop is competence, not delay.

payload.sub: Escalate to Level III. Until the approval is written, the test waits.
